name: MW Restaurant
tagline: Chef Wade Ueoka's elevated take on local comfort food — the ahi cake and foie gras loco moco are iconic Honolulu dishes.
talkStory: Chef Wade Ueoka (formerly of Alan Wong's) takes classic local dishes and elevates them with fine-dining technique. The ahi cake stacks layers of seared ahi, avocado, and won ton crisps; the foie gras loco moco is a decadent riff on the plate-lunch staple. The dining room is upscale but welcoming. Lunch is a better value than dinner. Reservations recommended.
